case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF VS. SLYVIA STUART

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STUART, SYLVIA $1,517.09 PRINCIPAL, $40.96 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,558.05 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
